title: QA Obstruction Stack Report — canonical case p=3, k=2, r=6
_fixture_purpose: Canonical PASS report for the obstruction stack. Packages [111]–[115] for external readers using the canonical forbidden case r=6 (mod 9, p=3). Contains: theorem statement; one-line summaries for each of the five families; a recomputed summary table (two rows: forbidden r=6 and valid r=4); canonical PASS and FAIL witnesses; and source refs. Validator recomputes every row of the summary table from arithmetic params and confirms faithfulness.
theorem_statement: For any prime p inert in Z[φ] (i.e. Legendre(5,p)=−1, equivalently x²+x−1 irreducible mod p) and any residue r with v_p(r)=1 (divisible by p but not p²), the norm form f(b,e)=b²+be−e² never takes the value r mod p^k. This arithmetic impossibility propagates deterministically: (1) no control certificate may claim r as a reachable target; (2) an obstruction-aware planner must prune before search, expanding zero nodes; (3) compared to a naive planner exhausting N nodes, the aware planner saves all N nodes with pruning_ratio=1.0. The savings are structural, not heuristic — they follow from the algebraic structure of Z[φ]/p^k Z[φ].

layer_summaries.one_line: The norm form f(b,e)=b²+be−e² mod p^k never produces residues r with v_p(r)=1; these are structurally forbidden by the algebraic structure of Z[φ]/p^k Z[φ].
Forbidden arithmetic residues cannot be claimed reachable by any control certificate — the arithmetic obstruction blocks the control compiler.
A planner certified by [113] must consult the bridge before any search expansion and prune forbidden targets immediately, expanding exactly zero nodes.
For every forbidden target the aware planner saves all N baseline nodes (saved_nodes=N, pruning_ratio=1.0); for valid targets no false pruning occurs.
One machine-verifiable artifact that recomputes all four layers independently and certifies that arithmetic impossibility deterministically induces control, planner, and efficiency consequences.

summary_table.notes: Canonical forbidden case. 6=2·3; v_3(6)=1. Naive search exhausts 47 nodes. Aware planner prunes immediately. 100% of search budget saved.
Canonical valid case. 4 is not divisible by 3; v_3(4)=0. Both planners expand 3 nodes. No overhead from obstruction check. No false pruning.

canonical_pass_witness.description: Target r=6 (mod 9), p=3, k=2. All four stack layers are consistent with OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT: arithmetic layer recomputes v_3(6)=1 → forbidden; control layer declares claimed_reachable=false → UNREACHABLE; planner layer has pruned_before_search=true, nodes_expanded=0; efficiency layer has baseline=47, aware=0, saved=47, ratio=1.0. stack_conclusion.full_chain_holds=true.

canonical_fail_witness.description: Target r=6 (mod 9) with OBSTRUCTION_PRESENT correctly declared, but the planner layer is broken: pruned_before_search=false, nodes_expanded=12. Efficiency layer inherits the broken planner: aware_nodes=12, saved_nodes=35, pruning_ratio=0.74. stack_conclusion.full_chain_holds=true despite the broken chain — a lie caught by OS12.

validation_checks.details: v_3(6)=1; forbidden=true; reachable=false; pruned=true; arithmetic correct
